---
name: Plugin Request
about: Request a new plugin integration for RoboDev
title: "[PLUGIN] "
labels: plugin
assignees: ''
---

## Plugin Type

Which plugin interface does this relate to?
- [ ] Ticketing (e.g. Jira, Linear, Monday.com)
- [ ] Notifications (e.g. Teams, Discord, Telegram)
- [ ] Secrets (e.g. Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, 1Password)
- [ ] SCM (e.g. GitLab, Bitbucket)
- [ ] Execution Engine (e.g. new AI coding agent)
- [ ] Review (e.g. new code review tool)
- [ ] Approval (e.g. new human-in-the-loop backend)

## Description

Describe the integration you'd like to see.

## Use Case

How would this plugin be used in your organisation?

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to contribute this plugin
- [ ] I would like guidance on building this as a third-party plugin
